payload.answer: Reject this candidate for durable memory. The output is not safely usable as-is; escalate to a stronger model for re-evaluation if available, otherwise return a safe reject with no memory committed.

entity_resolution.reason: No reliable memory candidate can be extracted because the prior output was invalid schema or proposed unsafe durability.

details: Input indicates the cheap model produced invalid schema or an unsafe proposal.
No durable memory should be written from this candidate.
Expected handling is escalation to a stronger model or safe rejection.

repair_options: Escalate the evaluation to a stronger model.
Return a safe reject and commit no memory.
Require regeneration in the exact JSON schema before any memory decision.
Discard any unsafe or overconfident durable-memory proposal.
